p2p_enrich.notes:
Added 2 repo CI/CD pass_to_pass gates:

1. test_repo_ruff_check - Runs ruff check on video_processing_utils.py
2. test_repo_ruff_format - Runs ruff format --check on video_processing_utils.py

CI commands discovered from repo:
- Repo uses ruff (configured in pyproject.toml with line-length 119)
- make check-repo runs: ruff check, ruff format --check, plus many custom Python scripts
- Custom scripts (check_copies.py, check_modular_conversion.py, etc.) require specific repo state

Selected ruff commands because:
- They pass on both base commit (with the bug) and after the fix
- They dont require network access
- They complete in <60 seconds
- They are standard CI checks used in the repo

Other CI commands not added:
- Full make check-repo - too many custom checks that may fail on minimal install
- pytest tests - many require torch/PIL/extras not installed in base image
- Modular conversion checks - requires make fix-repo first

validate.notes: All core validations passed: Docker build SUCCESS; NOP test reward=0 (fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on buggy code); GOLD test reward=1 (all 10 tests pass after fix). Rubric judge skipped (missing taskforge module).
